creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-06-30 18:43:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-im               Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-im/pidgin-rhythmbox Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    net-im/pidgin-rhythmbox/files patch-src__pidgin-rhythmbox.c 
  Log:
  The Pidgin-Rhythmbox plugin will automatically update your Pidgin user info and
  status message with the currently playing music in Rhythmbox. If the artist and
  title are known, it will also attempt to create a link to the song's lyrics by
  using Google's "I'm Feeling Lucky" feature.
  
  Author: Jon Oberheide
  WWW:    http://jon.oberheide.org/projects/pidgin-rhythmbox/
  
  PR:             ports/114117
  Submitted by:   Yuri Pankov <yuri at darklight.org.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.63      +1 -0      ports/net-im/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/net-im/pidgin-rhythmbox/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-im/pidgin-rhythmbox/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/net-im/pidgin-rhythmbox/files/patch-src__pidgin-rhythmbox.c (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/net-im/pidgin-rhythmbox/pkg-descr (new)
